title: He Had a Purple Heart, PTSD and a Rap Sheet. He Had to Leave the U.S.
summary_full: After a long battle with drug addiction, Sae Joon Park felt settled in a new life. But he was deported last year and is now fighting to get back to Hawaii.
summary_public: After a long battle with drug addiction, Sae Joon Park felt settled in a new life. But he was deported last year and is now fighting to get back to Hawaii.
